falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 breaks below 4000 (key support level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this level would indicate continued bearish momentum, contradicting the pattern's implied bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX volatility index spikes above 30 (14-day high)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would suggest market panic, invalidating the 'hold' signal by indicating a potential blowoff top rather than a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 fails to reach 4500 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Non-achievement of this price target from the bottom_2024_aug pattern would indicate the pattern is not valid, disproving the current verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
